g.text: Figure 9X. One condensed ML figure for part 9: frontier plus feature consensus

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: This single dense figure is meant to replace a larger stack of part-9 plots in the paper draft. It preserves the correct boundary: Blending is only slightly ahead on AUC, Logistic dominates on recall, and the task remains project-level structural risk ranking.
